name: Gazpacho De Los Angeles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the tomato juice, minced green bell pepper, onion, cucumber, green chiles, Worcestershire sauce, seasoning blend, garlic, olive oil, and chopped chives in a large bowl.
2. Stir in hot pepper sauce and season with MSG, salt, and white pepper to taste.
3. Chill thoroughly until serving.
4. Serve with lemon wedges.
5. For smooth gazpacho served with vegetable garnishes, transfer the mixture to a blender container and blend until smooth. Serve alongside additional diced cucumber, green pepper, and croutons.
